cases.prompt: Create a bright pluck with a fast attack and a little resonance.
Create a dark, rounded bass with a soft top end and almost no space.
Make a wide, airy pad with a slow fade-in, gentle chorus, more reverb, and a brighter open top.
Make it tighter and more percussive with a sharper transient and shorter tail.
Keep the core tone mostly the same but make it feel larger and more distant.
Start from the current patch and make it darker and softer.
Actually make it sharper, brighter, and more percussive instead.
No, strip the effects back down and make it punchier and drier right away.
